L

leave(int, RMIClientSkeleton) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to stop the server.
loadResults() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ShowResultsController
Method that loads the results of the game
LOBBIES - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
LOBBIES message type
LobbiesListMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby
This message is sent by the server to the client when the client asks for the list of lobbies.
LobbiesListMessage(MessageId, List<Integer>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.LobbiesListMessage
Constructor.
LobbyController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
This class is the controller of the lobby.fxml file It manages the lobby scene
LobbyController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LobbyController
 
LobbyRequestMessage - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby
This message is sent by the client to the server when the player wants to see the list of lobbies.
LobbyRequestMessage(MessageId) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.lobby.LobbyRequestMessage
Constructor.
LobbyState - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the LobbyState class implements the State interface and is the first phase of the game, where the game is instanced.
LobbyState(GameController) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states.LobbyState
the LobbyState method initialize the controller.
localGameInstance - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
The local game instance.
LoginController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
This class is the controller for the login.fxml file It handles the login screen, where the player can choose to create a new game or join an existing one
LoginController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LoginController
 
LShape - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective
The LShape class represents the objective cards that require the cards to be placed to form an L in order to be fulfilled.
LShape(int, int, Resource, Resource, Direction, Position) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.objective.LShape
The LShape(id, points, otherResource, cardColourThatTriggersCheck, direction, requestedPosition) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id, the points, the otherResource and the cardColourThatTriggersCheck attributes, and then it assigns the direction and the requestedPosition to the ones given as parameters.
